title: SAS Zero-Point Calibration
applicable_models: Universal — all models with electronic stability control
symptoms: VSC/ESC warning light on after wheel alignment
prerequisites: Steering wheel within ±5° of center (straight ahead)
No active ABS/VSC fault codes preventing calibration
Ignition in correct state (ON or key-on-engine-off)
warnings: Steering wheel MUST be within ±5° of center before executing calibration
Vehicle must remain completely stationary during procedure
Active ABS or brake system faults will prevent calibration — resolve those first
After calibration: drive >15 mph to confirm VSC warning light clears

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x10 sub-function 0x03 to ABS ECU (0x760). Required to unlock SAS calibration routines.
steps.caution: If rejected: verify ignition state and physical connection

steps.technical_detail: Read vehicle speed from ENGINE ECU via DID 0xF40D (standard vehicle speed). Speed must be 0. Steering must be within ±5° (visual confirmation required).
steps.caution: If speed check unavailable, proceed with warning that vehicle must be confirmed stationary

steps.technical_detail: UDS RoutineControl (0x31) start (0x01) for Routine ID 0x0200 (Toyota SAS zero-point write). Current steering position is stored as center (0°). Result byte: 0x00 or 0x01 = success. NRC 0x7F = ECU rejected.
steps.caution: If rejected (NRC): ensure vehicle stationary, steering centered, no active ABS/VSC faults

steps.technical_detail: 2-second delay to allow ECU to store calibration value in non-volatile memory.
steps.caution: Do not disconnect adapter or cycle ignition during this delay

steps.technical_detail: Read Toyota custom DID 0xF1A0 (SAS calibration status). Response byte: 0x00 = calibration STORED. Other values: check if VSC light clears after restart.
steps.caution: DID 0xF1A0 may not be supported on all ECU variants — non-fatal if unavailable

steps.technical_detail: UDS Service 0x14 group 0xFFFFFF clears all DTCs from ABS/VSC ECU including C1511, C1513, C1514.
steps.caution: After clearing: cycle ignition OFF→ON→wait 30 seconds. Drive >15 mph to confirm warning light clears.

did_map.0xF40D: Vehicle Speed (km/h, u8, direct — sourced from ENGINE ECU 0x700)

routine_ids.0x0200: SAS Zero-Point Write (Toyota/Lexus — set current position as 0°)

outcome_summary: Stores current steering wheel position as the sensor zero-point (0°). Resolves C1511/C1514 codes set after alignment, sensor replacement, or battery disconnect. One of the most common post-alignment procedures. ~5 seconds total.
